languages.text: "Расходная жизнеформа выполнила свою функцию по уничтожению противника. Ответный огонь закономерно повредил ее оболочку. Примерная эффективность жизнеформы равна 1/300 эффективности заряда корабельной орудия. Однако, мы не восстанавливаем заряды".

traits.locale_text: "Расходная единица выполнила свою функцию по уничтожению противника. Ответный огонь закономерно повредил ее оболочку. Примерная эффективность единицы равна 1/300 эффективности заряда корабельной орудия. Однако, мы не восстанавливаем заряды".

languages.text: "The expendable life form performed its function of destroying the enemy. Retaliatory fire naturally damaged its casing. The life form's approximate effectiveness is equal to 1/300 of the effectiveness of a ship's cannon charge. However, we do not refurbish charges."
languages.original_text: "Расходная жизнеформа выполнила свою функцию по уничтожению противника. Ответный огонь закономерно повредил ее оболочку. Примерная эффективность жизнеформы равна 1/300 эффективности заряда корабельной орудия. Однако, мы не восстанавливаем заряды".

traits.locale_text: "The expendable unit performed its function of destroying the enemy. Retaliatory fire naturally damaged its casing. The unit's approximate effectiveness is equal to 1/300 of the effectiveness of a ship's cannon charge. However, we do not refurbish charges."

"The expendable unit performed its function of destroying the enemy. Retaliatory fire naturally damaged its casing. The unit's approximate effectiveness is equal to 1/300 of the effectiveness of a ship's cannon charge. However, we do not refurbish charges."

"The expendable unit performed its function of destroying the enemy. Retaliatory fire naturally damaged its casing. The unit's approximate effectiveness is equal to 1/300 of the effectiveness of a ship's cannon charge. However, we do not refurbish charges."

languages.text: 「使い捨てユニットは敵を破壊するという本来の機能を果たした。報復射撃により、当然ながら外装が損傷した。このユニットの有効性は、艦載砲の砲弾1発の有効性の約1/300に等しい。だが、砲弾を修理して再使用することはない」
languages.original_text: "The expendable unit performed its function of destroying the enemy. Retaliatory fire naturally damaged its casing. The unit's approximate effectiveness is equal to 1/300 of the effectiveness of a ship's cannon charge. However, we do not refurbish charges."

traits.locale_text: 「使い捨てユニットは敵を破壊するという本来の機能を果たした。報復射撃により、当然ながら外装が損傷した。このユニットの有効性は、艦載砲の砲弾1発の有効性の約1/300に等しい。だが、砲弾を修理して再使用することはない。」

languages.text: « L'entité remplaçable remplissait sa fonction consistant à éliminer l'ennemi lorsque des tirs de riposte ont naturellement endommagé sa boîte crânienne. L'efficacité approximative de l'entité est égale à 1/300e de celle d'une charge de canon de vaisseau. Cependant, nous ne réparons pas les charges. »
languages.original_text: "The expendable life form performed its function of destroying the enemy. Retaliatory fire naturally damaged its casing. The life form's approximate effectiveness is equal to 1/300 of the effectiveness of a ship's cannon charge. However, we do not refurbish charges."

traits.locale_text: « L'entité remplaçable remplissait sa fonction consistant à éliminer l'ennemi lorsque des tirs de riposte ont naturellement endommagé sa boîte crânienne. L'efficacité approximative de l'entité est égale à 1/300e de celle d'une charge de canon de vaisseau. Cependant, nous ne réparons pas les charges. »

languages.text: "Feda edilebilir yaşam formu, düşmanı yok etme işlevini yerine getirdi. Düşman ateşi de doğal olarak bedenine zarar verdi. Yaşam formunun yaklaşık etkinliği, bir gemi topu atışının etkinliğinin 300'de 1'ine denktir. Tabii atışlar tek seferliktir."
languages.original_text: "The expendable life form performed its function of destroying the enemy. Retaliatory fire naturally damaged its casing. The life form's approximate effectiveness is equal to 1/300 of the effectiveness of a ship's cannon charge. However, we do not refurbish charges."

traits.locale_text: "Feda edilebilir yaşam formu, düşmanı yok etme işlevini yerine getirdi. Düşman ateşi de doğal olarak bedenine zarar verdi. Yaşam formunun yaklaşık etkinliği, bir gemi topu atışının etkinliğinin 300'de 1'ine denktir. Tabii atışlar tek seferliktir."

languages.text: "Die ersetzbare Lebensform hat ihren Zweck erfüllt und den Feind vernichtet. Die daraufhin eingeleiteten Vergeltungsmaßnahmen haben ihre Hülle beschädigt. Die ungefähre Effektivität der Lebensform entspricht 1/300 der Effizienz einer Schiffskanone. Von einer Generalüberholung ist abzuraten."
languages.original_text: "The expendable life form performed its function of destroying the enemy. Retaliatory fire naturally damaged its casing. The life form's approximate effectiveness is equal to 1/300 of the effectiveness of a ship's cannon charge. However, we do not refurbish charges."

traits.locale_text: "Die ersetzbare Lebensform hat ihren Zweck erfüllt und den Feind vernichtet. Die daraufhin eingeleiteten Vergeltungsmaßnahmen haben ihre Hülle beschädigt. Die ungefähre Effektivität der Lebensform entspricht 1/300 der Effizienz einer Schiffskanone. Von einer Generalüberholung ist abzuraten."

languages.text: «La forma de vida reemplazable ha cumplido con su función de destruir al enemigo. El contraataque destruyó su revestimiento. La efectividad aproximada de la forma de vida es equivalente a una tricentésima parte de una carga de cañón de nave, y pese a ello no reacondicionamos las cargas».
languages.original_text: "The expendable life form performed its function of destroying the enemy. Retaliatory fire naturally damaged its casing. The life form's approximate effectiveness is equal to 1/300 of the effectiveness of a ship's cannon charge. However, we do not refurbish charges."

traits.locale_text: «La forma de vida reemplazable ha cumplido con su función de destruir al enemigo. El contraataque destruyó su revestimiento. La efectividad aproximada de la forma de vida es equivalente a una tricentésima parte de una carga de cañón de nave, y pese a ello no reacondicionamos las cargas».

languages.text: “该可消耗生命体已完成摧毁敌人的任务。遭到反击时，其外壳自然会受到损坏。该生命体的效能约为舰炮一发炮弹装药的三百分之一。然而，我们并不会重新装药。”
languages.original_text: "The expendable life form performed its function of destroying the enemy. Retaliatory fire naturally damaged its casing. The life form's approximate effectiveness is equal to 1/300 of the effectiveness of a ship's cannon charge. However, we do not refurbish charges."

traits.locale_text: “该可消耗生命体已完成摧毁敌人的任务。遭到反击时，其外壳自然会受到损坏。该生命体的效能约为舰炮一发炮弹装药的三百分之一。然而，我们并不会重新装药。”
